peace-ui

Getting Started

Installation

Components

Button Input Card Dialog Dropdown Menu Tabs Select Popover Tooltip Sheet Accordion Sonner Sidebar Skeleton Command

Dialog

A modal dialog with spring enter/exit animation.

Install

npx peace-ui add dialog

Animation

Motion - spring scale 0.95→1, frosted backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl)

Usage

import { Dialog } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
